checks.reason: The corrected node is anchored to Imperato's 1599 printed museum/cabinet book.
Printed cabinet catalogs require print publication infrastructure.
Imperato's catalog used printed illustrations to represent the cabinet and specimens.
Botanical and natural-history collection culture supplies contextual subject matter but is not a universal hard prerequisite.
Printed cabinet catalogs should not be routed through standardized educational textbooks.
The source-backed catalog mechanism is publication and illustration, not conservation workshop practice.
The 1563 art academy anchor predates the 1599 printed cabinet catalog anchor.
